free_text: Formation of residual nuclei in interaction of
3.65A-GeV deuterons with 93Nb, l08Ag, 159Tb, 197Au,
and 207.2Pb nuclei
English transl. of
In Russian
same data.
Decay-data
For C-12(d,x)
for Al-27(d,x)
Statistical error.
Tbl.I
according to memo CP-D/216.
ELEM/MASS formalism excluded from REACTION
codes (Subents 012-163 added.) Lower case. Correction
data for lead is made.
Decay-data are included from REL-REF.
Last checking has been done.
Date is corrected
